name: Indiana Persimmon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Lightly grease and flour two 9x5-inch or three 8x4-inch loaf pans.
3. Combine the raisins with brandy in a separate bowl.
4. In a large bowl, mix together the sugars, persimmon pulp, and oil.
5. Add eggs one at a time to the sugar mixture, beating well after each addition.
6. Sift the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg) into another bowl.
7. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the egg mixture, stirring in the brandied raisins and chopped walnuts.
8. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pans.
9. Bake for 1 hour, checking with a cake tester to ensure the bread is done. Adjust cooking time if necessary.
10. Makes about 16 slices.
